tasks.prompt: Build a responsive marketing landing page with a hero, a three-column feature grid, and a footer.
tasks.acceptance: Renders responsively; no accessibility errors; static (zero server).

tasks.prompt: Build an authenticated settings page behind a guard with a sidebar and a profile form.
tasks.acceptance: Guard redirects unauthenticated users; form saves via a server action.

tasks.prompt: Build a three-step validated form (account, profile, review) with a typed model and server validation.
tasks.acceptance: Client and server validation; per-field errors; state preserved across steps.

tasks.prompt: Build a sortable, filterable, paginated table of evaluation runs with row selection.
tasks.acceptance: Sort by any column; filter; select rows; correct counts.

tasks.prompt: Build a streaming chat over a model, with a prompt editor, streaming response, and a token meter.
tasks.acceptance: Tokens stream in; cost updates live; Ctrl/Cmd+Enter submits.

tasks.prompt: Build a multi-file upload with a drag-and-drop zone and a progress bar.
tasks.acceptance: Multiple files upload; progress reaches 100; server receives them.

tasks.prompt: Build a real-time operations dashboard with live-updating stats and a job progress list.
tasks.acceptance: Values update live over SSE; job statuses transition.

tasks.prompt: Build an accessible command palette opened with Ctrl/Cmd+K that filters and runs commands.
tasks.acceptance: Keyboard-drivable; filters; runs a navigation and an action command.

tasks.prompt: Build a complex stateful editor: a document outline tree, a resizable split view, and reorderable sections.
tasks.acceptance: Tree navigates by keyboard; split resizes; sections reorder by drag and keyboard.
